body: FUNCTION START MAIN RETURNS NUMBER END LINE
${2:OUTPUT TEXT START HELLO TEXT END END LINE}
${3:OUTPUT TEXT START WORLD TEXT END END LINE}
${2:OUTPUT TEXT START LOOP TEXT END END LINE}
FUNCTION START MAIN RETURNS NUMBER END LINE
LET WINDOW AS NUMBER VALUE CALL WINWINDOW TEXT START ${1:TLANG UI} TEXT END ${2:FOUR HUNDRED} ${3:THREE HUNDRED} END LINE
LET BUTTON AS NUMBER VALUE CALL WINBUTTON WINDOW TEXT START ${4:OK} TEXT END TEN TEN ONE HUNDRED FORTY TEN END LINE
WHILE CALL WINWAIT DO END LINE
LET COMMAND AS NUMBER VALUE CALL WINCOMMAND END LINE
IF EQUAL COMMAND TEN THEN END LINE
CALL WINMESSAGE TEXT START ${5:TLANG} TEXT END TEXT START ${6:HELLO} TEXT END END LINE
Windows UI.description: Create a Windows API UI program

body: FUNCTION START MAIN RETURNS NUMBER END LINE
LET CANVAS AS NUMBER VALUE CALL GRAPHICSWINDOW TEXT START ${1:PIXELS} TEXT END ${2:EIGHT} ${3:EIGHT} END LINE
LET COLOR AS NUMBER VALUE CALL GRAPHICSHEX TEXT START ${4:#FF0000} TEXT END END LINE
CALL GRAPHICSPIXEL CANVAS ${7:ZERO} ${8:ZERO} COLOR END LINE
Pixel Graphics Program.description: Create a pixel dictionary graphics program
